specialists.why: The project outline lacks technical implementation details regarding system disengagement and specific security controls for the document upload feature.

items.text: Will there be a manual 'kill-switch' or disengagement procedure to take the chatbot offline immediately if it begins generating harmful or highly inaccurate legal advice?
options: Yes, a manual kill-switch is planned
No, but automated alerts are planned
No disengagement procedure has been designed yet

items.text: What specific technical controls (e.g., input sanitization, file type validation, or prompt analysis firewalls) are planned to protect the document upload feature against malicious files and prompt injection attacks?

specialists.why: The storage location of the privacy threshold assessment and privacy impact assessment must be recorded to complete the assessment.

items.text: Where will the privacy threshold assessment and/or privacy impact assessment (PIA) for the C&D Claim Evaluator be stored?

specialists.why: The project outline lacks details regarding fairness definitions, stakeholder consultation, and team diversity, which are critical for completing these sections of the assessment.

items.text: Has the project team established a clear definition of fairness and selected specific qualitative or quantitative metrics to measure and monitor potential bias in the chatbot's legal analyses?
Has the project team conducted or planned any formal consultations with key stakeholders, such as small business owners, legal experts, or the business.gov legal team?
Does the project team include individuals with diverse skills, backgrounds, and experiences (e.g., legal, UX/UI, accessibility, and cultural diversity experts) to oversee the AI lifecycle?

specialists.why: To establish formal compliance and record-keeping structures for this high-risk AI use case.

items.text: Has the agency designated an accountable official and an accountable use case owner for the C&D Claim Evaluator system?
options: Only the accountable official has been designated
No, neither has been designated yet

items.text: Has a formal Privacy Impact Assessment (PIA) or consultation with human rights/anti-discrimination advisors been scheduled for this project?
Where will the formal legal advice, once obtained, be officially stored within the agency's records management system?

specialists.why: To ensure compliance with Commonwealth recordkeeping standards and strict data privacy controls regarding sensitive legal disputes.

items.text: Will the system store or log the uploaded cease and desist letters and chat transcripts, and if so, where will these records be hosted to comply with Commonwealth recordkeeping requirements?
Are there any plans to use the uploaded letters or user prompts to fine-tune or train future iterations of the AI model?

specialists.why: To refine the implementation details of the procurement, piloting, and operational oversight of the chatbot.

items.text: Has a specific commercial or open-source Large Language Model (LLM) been pre-selected or procured for this chatbot, or is the model selection still open?
Is there an existing business.gov operational team or legal team designated to act as the human-in-the-loop operators and supervisors for this AI system?
